content:
Dev tools | ide
Make your VS Code more developer frinedly with these extensions

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Let’s take a look at some incredibly useful VS Code extensions that will make your life so much easier. I use all of these personally, and they have completely transformed my workflow. You won’t find the usual suspects here. Some of the extensions on this list don’t have massive download counts, but they are absolute game-changers for daily coding.
AI Based Extensions
NVIDIA NIM Provider
This extension allows you to use NVIDIA NIM models directly within GitHub Copilot for free. To get started, generate a NIM API key from the official site and install this extension. Open the Copilot window, click on the model name, and select the settings icon. From there, click Add Models, choose NVIDIA NIM from the list, and select your preferred model from the available options.
Hugging Face Provider for GitHub Copilot Chat
Similar to the NVIDIA NIM provider, this extension lets you use Hugging Face models inside GitHub Copilot completely free of charge. All you need is a Hugging Face API key to get started. These two extensions are incredibly useful for…
